utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He said , " Nice to meet you Glenda . " Well , obviously I could not give him my real name ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_obviously I could not give him my real name

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Come on , you saw the way he ran out of here !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: What do you think ? He is gonna stick around and talk to the daughter he abandoned !

emotion_cause.span: 6_What do you think ? He is gonna stick around and talk to the daughter he abandoned !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What did you say to him ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , I said , I told him you know , that I was the executor person of Francis will and that I needed to talk to him so I am gonna meet him at the coffee house later .
